title: hieracium rapunculoides subsp. contractum
intro: Hieracium rapunculoides subsp. contractum is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, specifically a low-growing perennial with yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium rapunculoides subsp. contractum are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to make teas and tonics for medicinal purposes.
